name: agentic-platform
description: Free agent diagnostic tools + expert skill files. Score your agent's governance (0-100), lint MCP tool definitions, estimate costs across models.
author: andysalvo

tools.name: agent_health_check
tools.description: Score your agent's configuration on governance and best practices (0-100). No API key needed.

tools.name: mcp_manifest_lint
tools.description: The only MCP linter that exists. Check tool definitions for anti-patterns and missing fields. No API key needed.

tools.name: estimate_agent_cost
tools.description: Estimate task costs across all major models with comparison table and optimization tips. No API key needed.

tools.name: register
tools.description: Get a free API key for expert skill files (10 calls/day).

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available expert skill files with descriptions.

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Retrieve an expert skill file. Curated context packages with auditable provenance.

tools.name: buy_credits
tools.description: Get a Stripe checkout link to purchase more credits.

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check your current usage and remaining calls.
